use_cases: Creating immersive animated backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Adding interactive gradient effects that follow mouse movement
Enhancing visual appeal of web applications with smooth color transitions
Providing customizable atmospheric effects for brand presentations
Serving as a dynamic backdrop for content overlay on marketing sites
ai_summary: A highly customizable animated gradient background component featuring interactive mouse-following behavior with multiple color stops and configurable blending modes. The component includes Safari browser detection for cross-browser compatibility, theme-aware styling (dark/light modes), and smooth parallax-like animation effects. Ideal for creating engaging visual atmospheres in landing pages, hero sections, and marketing websites.
